item.title: 💧 Capital Return · Recap · GNS
item.ns0:headline: Cancels 20M shares (16% of float); total 26.6M this week (22% of float)
item.description:
Cancels 20M shares (16% of float); total 26.6M this week (22% of float)

Cancelled 20M Class A Ordinary Shares returned from Entrepreneur Resorts Ltd, equivalent to 16% of public float. Combined with prior 6.6M share cancellation, total reduction of 26.6M shares (22% of float) this week. Company targets up to 43.3M shares (36% of float) for repurchase/retirement; AGM on July 7 to vote on new buyback mandate.

About: Genius Group Limited provides entrepreneur education system business development tools and management consultancy services to entrepreneurs. It operates through Central, Academy, School, and Resorts segments. The company develops entrepreneurial education curriculum with various tools for student learning and faculty earning.

  • Counterparty: Entrepreneur Resorts Ltd
  • Announced: 2026-06-17

item.title: 📤 Divestiture · CSAN
item.ns0:headline: Sells 12% of Radar's land portfolio for BRL 586M
item.description:
Sells 12% of Radar's land portfolio for BRL 586M

Through Radar Group, entered into a purchase and sale agreement to dispose of 12% of Radar's agricultural land portfolio (41,214 hectares in Mato Grosso) for a total price of BRL 1.85 billion, of which Cosan's interest is approximately BRL 586 million. The transaction is subject to customary conditions and aligns with Cosan's divestment and deleveraging strategy. The buyer is not named.

About: Cosan S.A. engages in the fuel distribution business. It operates through Raízen, Compass, Moove, Rumo, and Radar segments. The company’s Raízen segment engages in the production, marketing, origination, and trading of sugar, as well as ethanol; production and marketing of bioenergy, and solar energy and biogas; trading and resale of electricity; and trading and marketing of fossil, renewable fuels, and lubricants under the Shell brand.

  • Deal value: BRL 586 million
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-16

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · BNAI
item.ns0:headline: Acquires Cataneo GmbH for $19.5M ($9M cash + $37.88/sh stock); all conditions met
item.description:
Acquires Cataneo GmbH for $19.5M ($9M cash + $37.88/sh stock); all conditions met

Reported that all conditions to close its acquisition of Cataneo GmbH have been satisfied under the Share Purchase and Transfer Agreement announced April 30, 2026. Total consideration is $19.5 million, consisting of $9 million in cash and 250,792 shares of BNAI common stock valued at $37.88 per share. Seller Christian Unterseer is expected to join BNAI's board upon closing.

About: Brand Engagement Network, Inc. provides conversational AI solutions. The company’s AI agents are built on proprietary natural language processing, multisensory awareness, sentiment, and environmental analysis, as well as real-time individuation and personalization capabilities. It serves the automotive, healthcare, financial services, and other industries through direct sales force and channel partners. The company was formerly known as Blockchain Exchange Network Inc.

  • Counterparty: Cataneo GmbH
  • Deal value: 19500000
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2026-04-30

item.title: 📉 Delisting · Forced · YMAT
item.ns0:headline: Staff delisting determination; hearing stay, shares continue trading
item.description:
Staff delisting determination; hearing stay, shares continue trading

J-Star received a Staff Delisting Determination from Nasdaq for failing to maintain the minimum $1.00 bid price after the cure period expired on June 10, 2026. The company will request an oral hearing before the Nasdaq Hearings Panel, which will automatically stay any suspension or delisting pending the Panel's decision. Shares continue trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market under YMAT during the process.

About: J-Star Holding Co., Ltd. manufactures and trades in bicycles, sports accessories, and carbon fiber composite products in Taiwan, China, and internationally. It offers bicycles parts of sports bicycles and electric bicycles; paddle rackets for use in tennis, badminton, squash, and beach tennis; and structural parts of automobile, other sporting goods, and healthcare products. J-Star Holding Co., Ltd. has a strategic partnership with Patriot Green Energy Technology Co., Ltd.

  • Announced: 2026-06-12

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · HUN
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Olin Corp to form OlinHuntsman; close H1 2027
item.description:
Acquired by Olin Corp to form OlinHuntsman; close H1 2027

Corporation (HUN) will be acquired by Olin Corporation in a merger to create OlinHuntsman Corporation, an integrated North American chemicals leader with complementary capabilities and enhanced cost position. The transaction is expected to close in the first half of 2027, subject to approval by Huntsman stockholders and Olin shareholders, as well as regulatory clearances. A joint proxy statement/prospectus will be filed with the SEC and mailed to shareholders.

About: Huntsman Corporation manufactures and sells diversified organic chemical products worldwide. The company operates in three segments: Polyurethanes, Performance Products, and Advanced Materials. The Polyurethanes segment offers polyurethane chemicals, including methyl diphenyl diisocyanate, polyether and polyester polyols, and thermoplastic polyurethane; and aniline, benzene, nitrobenzene and other co-products.

  • Counterparty: Olin Corporation
  • Expected Close: first half of 2027

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · FTHM
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Bed Bath & Beyond at 0.2236x stock ratio
item.description:
Acquired by Bed Bath & Beyond at 0.2236x stock ratio

Entered into a definitive merger agreement with Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. Each Fathom share will be converted into 0.2236 shares of Bed Bath & Beyond common stock, with no appraisal rights under North Carolina law. The merger is subject to Fathom shareholder approval, SEC effectiveness of the S-4 registration statement, and NYSE listing of additional Bed Bath & Beyond shares, with an outside closing date of December 16, 2026. The agreement includes a termination fee expense reimbursement of up to $1.0 million payable by Fathom if shareholder approval is not obtained.

About: Fathom Holdings Inc. provides a real estate services platform that integrates residential brokerage, mortgage, title, and insurance services in the United States. It operates through three segments: Real Estate Brokerage, Mortgage, and Title. The Real Estate Brokerage segment provides real estate brokerage services. The Mortgage segment offers residential loan origination and underwriting services.

  • Counterparty: Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc.
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: June 16, 2026
  • Expected Close: December 16, 2026

item.title: 👀 Activist · FRMI
item.ns0:headline: Pushes for John Sellers as Chairman/CEO; slams board for ignoring strategic bids
item.description:
Pushes for John Sellers as Chairman/CEO; slams board for ignoring strategic bids

Toby Neugebauer and his group issued an open letter calling for John Sellers (Co-CEO of Double Eagle Energy III) to be made Chairman and CEO of Fermi immediately. Neugebauer criticizes the current board for ignoring acquisition interest from hyperscalers and tech investors, breaching fiduciary duty, and destroying value. The activist reaffirms his campaign to seat a new board and improve shareholder value in the REIT.

About: Fermi Inc. engages in the development of private power campus for AI-centric customers in the United States. The company also develops, owns, and leases grid-independent energy generation and high-performance computing campuses; develops and operates integrated power generation and computing infrastructure. It also engages in acquisition of land, permitting, construction, and long-term leases.

  • Announced: 2026-06-16

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · Distressed Exchange · GOSS
item.ns0:headline: Completes distressed exchange of 5% 2027 convert notes for new 7.5% secured notes + equity
item.description:
Completes distressed exchange of 5% 2027 convert notes for new 7.5% secured notes + equity

Announced final tender results for its exchange offer to swap any and all of its 5.00% Convertible Senior Notes due 2027 for a pro rata portion of (i) up to $72.0M of new 7.50% Convertible Senior Secured First Lien Notes due 2030, (ii) up to 317,647,058 shares of common stock (or prefunded warrants for QIBs), and (iii) warrants for early tendering Eligible Holders. A special meeting of stockholders to approve related proposals is scheduled for July 14, 2026.

About: Gossamer Bio, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on developing and commercializing seralutinib for the treatment of pulmonary hypertension and pulmonary arterial hypertension in the United States. The company develops GB002, an inhaled, small molecule, platelet-derived growth factor receptor, or PDGFR, colony-stimulatin factor 1 receptor and c-KIT inhibitor, which is in Phase 3 clinical trial for the treatment of PAH. It has license agreements with Pulmokine, Inc.

item.ns0:headline: Sells $60.4M in properties; $86.8M unconditional, $196.6M conditional; BMO marketing 1.3M sq ft
item.description:
Sells $60.4M in properties; $86.8M unconditional, $196.6M conditional; BMO marketing 1.3M sq ft

RFA Financial completed $60.4M in property sales, has $86.8M in unconditional sale contracts and $196.6M in conditional contracts, and initiated a BMO Capital Markets-led marketing process for an additional 1.3M square feet of industrial assets. The closed and unconditional sales represent a 4.1% premium over December 2025 IFRS values. The company is recycling capital from real estate into higher-return financial services investments.

About: RFA Financial Inc. is a diversified commercial real estate investment trust and is an unincorporated closed-end real estate investment trust, created under, and governed by, the laws of the Province of Manitoba. The REIT was created pursuant to the Declaration of Trust dated November 8, 2004, as most recently amended and restated on December 19, 2021. Certain of the REIT's securities are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange.

item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Won · QURE
item.ns0:headline: FDA agrees Phase I/II data can support accelerated approval BLA for AMT-130; submission Q3 2026
item.description:
FDA agrees Phase I/II data can support accelerated approval BLA for AMT-130; submission Q3 2026

Announced that the FDA communicated during a Type B meeting that the 3-year analysis from the Phase I/II study of AMT-130 in Huntington's disease is acceptable as the primary basis of a Biologics License Application (BLA) for accelerated approval. The company intends to submit the BLA in the third quarter of 2026 and will align with FDA on the confirmatory study design prior to submission. The FDA committed to work expeditiously on alignment.

About: uniQure N.V. develops treatments for patients suffering from rare and other devastating diseases in the United States. The company offers HEMGENIX that allows people living with hemophilia B to produce factor IX, which can lower the risk of bleeding. Its lead product candidate is AMT-130, a gene therapy candidate, which is in phase I/II clinical study for the treatment of Huntington’s disease.

  • Announced: 2026-06-17

item.description:
Acquired by Sun Pharma USA for $14.00 cash per share; vote July 23

item.description:
Faces proxy contest from Radoff-Jumana Group; AGM July 21

Faces a proxy contest from the Radoff-Jumana Group, which owns 8.7% of shares and has nominated two director candidates for election at the 2026 Annual Meeting. The Annual Meeting is scheduled for July 21, 2026; the group is soliciting proxies to elect its nominees and opposes the company's equity plan and executive compensation. The group has been engaging with the company since March 2026 and previously filed a 13D.

About: Genesco Inc. operates as a retailer and wholesaler of footwear, apparel, and accessories. The company operates through four segments: Journeys Group, Schuh Group, Johnston & Murphy Group, and Genesco Brands Group. The Journeys Group segment offers footwear and accessories for young men, women, and children through the Journeys, Journeys Kidz, and Little Burgundy retail chains, as well as through e-commerce operations.

item.title: 📤 Divestiture · MXROF
item.ns0:headline: Sells Florália iron property to Bolt Metals for 26.8M shares
item.description:
Sells Florália iron property to Bolt Metals for 26.8M shares

Max Resource entered a definitive option agreement with Bolt Metals for its Florália high-purity iron property in Brazil. Bolt can earn 100% by issuing 26.8M common shares to Max over 30 months, with a minimum 25% post-issuance stake. Separately, Bolt issued 4M shares and 2M pre-funded warrants to Max to settle exploration costs. Max gains board nomination rights if it holds ≥5% of Bolt. The transactions are subject to regulatory approvals.

About: Max Resource Corp. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in South America and Canada. It primarily explores for gold, silver, copper, and iron deposits. The company holds 100% interest in the Sierra Azul project located in the northeastern Colombia; and Florália Property located near the east the city Belo Horizonte, Brazil. It also holds a 100% interest in the Mora Property located near the south of Medellin, Colombia.

  • Counterparty: Bolt Metals Corp.
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-05-13

item.ns0:headline: Faces proxy contest from Diana Shipping; AGM June 18
item.description:
Faces proxy contest from Diana Shipping; AGM June 18

Faces a proxy contest from its largest shareholder Diana Shipping Inc., which is seeking to elect two independent directors (Jens Ismar and Paul Cornell) and urging votes against ratifying the poison pill and equity incentive plan. Diana's $24.80 per share all-cash tender offer for Genco remains open until June 26. The annual meeting is scheduled for June 18, 2026.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping Inc.
  • Offer price: 24.80
  • Stake: 14.93%
  • Consideration: cash

item.title: 🧭 Domicile · NVA
item.ns0:headline: Redomiciled to Nevada via scheme; US Holdco to list on NYSE American
item.description:
Redomiciled to Nevada via scheme; US Holdco to list on NYSE American

Limited (Australian) implemented a redomiciliation to Nevada under a statutory scheme of arrangement, becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of US Holdco (Nova Minerals Corp). ADS holders received one share of US Holdco common stock per ADS (1 ADR = 12 ordinary shares); ordinary shareholders received one share per 12 ordinary shares. US Holdco will list on NYSE American starting June 17, 2026, replacing Nova Minerals' Nasdaq listing. The old entity terminates its SEC registration.

About: Nova Minerals Limited engages in the exploration of mineral properties in Australia and the United States. The company explores for gold, antimony, and critical minerals. It owns 85% interest in the flagship Estelle Gold project comprising 803 mining claims covering an area of 514 square kilometers located in the State of Alaska. The company was formerly known as Quantum Resources Limited and changed its name to Nova Minerals Limited in December 2017.

  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-06-16

item.title: 📤 Divestiture · CRK
item.ns0:headline: Sells 27% stake in Pinnacle Gas to Sixth Street for $600M; implies $2.2B EV
item.description:
Sells 27% stake in Pinnacle Gas to Sixth Street for $600M; implies $2.2B EV

Sold a 27% non-controlling equity interest in its midstream subsidiary Pinnacle Gas Services to Sixth Street for $600 million, implying a $2.2 billion enterprise value for Pinnacle. Proceeds were used to fully retire Pinnacle's preferred equity and outstanding indebtedness, deleveraging the balance sheet and reducing fixed charges by ~$40M per year. Comstock retains a 73% controlling stake and will continue to operate Pinnacle under a management services agreement.

About: Comstock Resources, Inc., an independent energy company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of natural gas and oil properties in the United States. Its assets covering an area of approximately 1,069,991 acres are located in the Haynesville and Bossier shales located in North Louisiana and East Texas. The company was incorporated in 1919 and is headquartered in Frisco, Texas.

  • Counterparty: Sixth Street
  • Deal value: $600 million
  • Stake: 27%
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-15

item.ns0:headline: Acquires Pizza Hut brand in Mainland China from Yum! Brands for $1.2B cash
item.description:
Acquires Pizza Hut brand in Mainland China from Yum! Brands for $1.2B cash

Entered a definitive agreement to acquire ownership of the Pizza Hut brand in Mainland China from Yum! Brands for $1.2 billion in cash. The transaction eliminates future license fee payments and is expected to close in Q3 2026, immediately enhancing restaurant margins and being accretive to diluted EPS starting in 2026. Yum China plans to fund the acquisition through cash and debt while maintaining its $1.5B capital return plan for 2026.

About: Yum China Holdings, Inc. owns, operates, and franchises restaurants in the People’s Republic of China. The company operates KFC, Pizza Hut, and All Other segments. It operates restaurants under the KFC, Pizza Hut, Taco Bell, Lavazza, Little Sheep, and Huang Ji Huang concepts. The company also offers online food deliver services. Yum China Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People’s Republic of China.

  • Counterparty: Yum! Brands, Inc.

  • Consideration: cash

item.description:
Terminates home engineering acquisition, returns 50.1% stake; CEO resigns

Great Estate Blockchain Inc. (VAYK) announced mutual termination of the acquisition agreement under which it held a 50.1% ownership interest in a home engineering business. The divested business contributed approximately $2.0 million of VAYK's 2025 revenue. The termination resulted from an unresolvable valuation adjustment dispute tied to the acquired business exceeding $1.5M revenue while VAYK's stock price remained below $0.001. CEO Jason Armstrong resigned; Paula Wang appointed interim CEO. The board will evaluate strategic alternatives.

The company, through its Vaycaychella solution, a peer to peer software application supports entrepreneurs in financing the acquisition and renovation of short-term vacation rental properties. item.description:

Ionik Corporation completed the equity conversion and maturity extension components of its comprehensive debt reorganization, converting approximately US$32.2 million of acquisition-related debt into 225.6 million common shares at prices from US$0.109 to US$0.33. Remaining cash repayments of ~US$25.8 million are expected to be funded by a new senior debt facility; the transaction used a financial hardship exemption and is subject to TSXV final acceptance.

About: Ionik Corporation operates as a multi-platform technology company in the United States and internationally. Ionik Corporation is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.

item.description:

Gerdau entered into a binding Share Purchase Agreement with COPEL to acquire COPEL's 23.03% equity interest in DFESA for an enterprise value of R$150 million, payable in cash at closing. Combined with a prior agreement to buy CELESC's stake, Gerdau will hold 100% of DFESA for a total enterprise value of R$300 million. The transaction is subject to Brazilian antitrust approval and other customary conditions.

The company offers rebars, bars, wires, thick plates, hot rolled coils, billets, blooms, plates, wire rods, and structural profiles. It also provides special steel products for agricultural, automotive, construction, distribution, energy, industrial, and mining markets.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · TWO
item.ns0:headline: Engages UWMC on competing all-cash bid; CCM $12.00/sh deal pending; vote June 23
item.description:
Engages UWMC on competing all-cash bid; CCM $12.00/sh deal pending; vote June 23

Is being acquired by CrossCountry Intermediate Holdco (CCM) for $12.00 per share in cash, plus a stub dividend, with committed financing. The filing details a competing unsolicited bid from UWM Holdings (UWMC), which proposed $12.50 per share cash elect or default stock consideration (2.3328 UWMC shares, implied ~$7.77/sh based on UWMC's May 11 closing price of $3.33). The board determined the UWMC proposal was not a 'Company Superior Proposal' under the CCM agreement. On June 8, CCM granted a waiver allowing TWO to engage with UWMC on an all-cash bid. Discussions occurred June 11, but UWMC did not submit a revised all-cash proposal by the waiver's expiry on June 12. The special meeting to vote on the CCM merger has been adjourned to June 23, 2026. 41 of 53 required state and agency regulatory approvals have been obtained.

About: Two Harbors Investment Corp. invests in, finances, and manages mortgage servicing rights (MSRs), agency residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS), and other financial assets through RoundPoint in the United States. The company target assets include agency RMBS collateralized by fixed rate mortgage loans, adjustable rate mortgage loans, hybrid mortgage loans, or derivatives; and other assets, such as financial and mortgage-related assets, comprising non-agency securities and non-hedging trans…

  • Counterparty: CCM (CrossCountry); competing bidder UWMC
  • Offer price: $12.00 (CCM); $12.50 cash elect (UWMC)
  • Consideration: cash

item.description:

item.description:
Subsidiary Bally's Intralot to acquire Evoke PLC for £243M; 0.537 shares or 52p cash

Bally's Corp's majority-owned subsidiary Bally's Intralot S.A. has agreed to acquire Evoke PLC via a scheme of arrangement. Evoke shareholders will receive 0.537 new Bally's Intralot shares per Evoke share, or 52 pence in cash (capped at £117.1M). The deal values Evoke at approximately £243.1M and is expected to close between Q4 2026 and Q1 2027, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

About: Bally’s Corporation is a fast-growing global entertainment brand with 19 casinos across 11 US states and one casino in Newcastle, UK, along with a golf course in New York and a horse racetrack in Colorado. Bally’s also owns Bally Bet, a first-in-class sports betting and igaming platform, licensed in 13 jurisdictions in North America. Bally’s holds a majority interest in Bally’s Intralot S.A. a leading lottery solutions supplier and igaming operator.

Entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Treeline Biosciences in an all-stock merger. Treeline is valued at $2.5B equity; Standard BioTools stockholders will hold ~16% of the combined company, with Treeline stockholders holding ~84%. Closing is subject to Standard BioTools stockholder approval, SEC effectiveness of the S-4, Nasdaq listing, and other customary conditions.

About: Standard BioTools Inc., together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells a range of instrumentation, consumables, and services to scientists and biomedical researchers to develop therapeutics in the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia pacific. The company operates through Proteomics and Genomics segments. Its proteomics and genomics include instruments, consumables, and assays for clinical and diagnostic uses.

item.ns0:headline: Rejects Diana's $24.80/share tender; urges WHITE proxy vote
item.description:
Rejects Diana's $24.80/share tender; urges WHITE proxy vote

Genco Shipping & Trading's board recommends shareholders reject Diana Shipping's unsolicited tender offer of $24.80 per share in cash, calling it inadequate as it represents a discount to net asset value and lacks a control premium. The board also urges shareholders to vote the WHITE proxy card in favor of Genco's nominees in the concurrent proxy contest. Diana is seeking to replace the entire Genco board and acquire the company on the cheap.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping Inc.
  • Offer price: $24.80 per share
  • Consideration: cash

Faces a proxy contest and all-cash tender offer from largest shareholder Diana Shipping Inc. at $24.80 per share. Diana is seeking to elect six independent nominees at the June 18 annual meeting and urges shareholders to tender shares by June 26. The activist challenges Genco's valuation methodology and demands removal of the poison pill.

item.description:
Launches strategic review; settles recall litigation for $271.6M

CooperCompanies announced a strategic review and recorded a $271.6M net pre-tax charge to resolve over 95% of claims from a 2023 fertility media recall. The charge consists of $324.1M in accrued liabilities offset by $52.5M expected insurance recoveries, with majority of payments expected in fiscal 2026. The strategic review follows the resolution of the litigation and aims to drive sustainable growth.

About: The Cooper Companies, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and markets contact lens wearers. The company operates in two segments, CooperVision and CooperSurgical. The CooperVision segment offers spherical, toric, and multifocal contact lenses that address vision challenges, such as astigmatism, presbyopia, and myopia. Its CooperSurgical segment focuses on family and women’s health care, which provides fertility products and services, medical devices, and contraception,

  • Announced: 2026-06-04

item.description:
Acquires Future NRG in all-stock deal; FNRG holders to own >99% of combined

Entered into a Business Combination Agreement to acquire Future NRG Sdn. Bhd. by exchanging all FNRG shares for BGMS common stock, making FNRG a wholly owned subsidiary. FNRG shareholders will own over 99% of the combined company, while pre-exchange BGMS stockholders will own less than 1%. The transaction requires stockholder approval, Nasdaq listing, and SEC registration statement effectiveness, with a termination date of December 31, 2026.

About: Bio Green Med Solution, Inc. engages in the distributing, trading, and installation of protective and fire safety materials and equipment, and fire protection and prevention systems. It is also involved in research and development of pharmaceuticals. The company was formerly known as Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and changed its name to Bio Green Med Solution, Inc. in September 2022. Bio Green Med Solution, Inc. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

item.description:

. issued a press release exposing distortions by activist fund ZimCal (Stephen Hodges) in its third consecutive proxy contest. ZimCal is nominating three unqualified directors to the board, while Medallion urges shareholders to vote for its own nominees at the annual meeting on June 9, 2026. The release highlights ZimCal's goal of a debt buyout and the troubling track record of nominee Eric Kelly.

item.description:

Is defending against a proxy contest launched by DOMA Perpetual Capital Management, which has nominated three director candidates for election at the June 9, 2026 annual meeting. The company urges stockholders to vote the BLUE proxy card in favor of its own three nominees, citing recommendations from ISS, Glass Lewis, and Egan-Jones that DOMA's representation is not warranted. The outcome of the vote will determine board control and the future strategic direction of the company.

item.description:

NSTS Bancorp's subsidiary bank, North Shore Trust and Savings, divested its mortgage lending division, Oak Leaf Community Mortgage (OLCM), to an unaffiliated national mortgage lender as part of its pending merger with Brookfield Bancshares. The company expects no material gain or loss from the transaction.
